raw_sections.projects:
1. Medical Crisis Management and Support System with Geo-Position Communication
(Website Development Project)
Developed a web-based emergency response system connecting hospitals, ambulances, and users.
Implemented real-time tracking of ICU beds, ventilators, and blood bank availability.
Enabled ambulance tracking and instant alerts for doctors.
Technologies Used: PHP, MySQL, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Bootstrap, AJAX, jQuery
2. Multi-Modal Medical Imaging Diagnosis System
Developed an AI-based clinical decision support system for medical image analysis.
Implemented CNN models to analyze X-ray, MRI, and skin lesion images.
Built a secure web platform using Django and MySQL for image upload and management.
Generated disease predictions with confidence scores to assist diagnosis.
